Alice is the lead.\",\n  extract=True,\n  importance=0.8,\n)\n","language":"python"}]

",["$","code",null,{"children":"\"inferred\""}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"\"tool\""}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"\"imported\""}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"\"unknown\""}]," None"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"None"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["Filter by memory type: ",["$","code",null,{"children":"\"FACT\""}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"\"PREFERENCE\""}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"\"DECISION\""}],", etc. (v2.3)"]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"temporal_weight"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"float"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"0.0"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"How much recency decay influences the final score (0.0–1.0). Default 0.0 (disabled)"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"query_time"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"str | None"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"None"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"ISO 8601 timestamp to use as \"now\" for temporal decay calculations"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"temporal_halflife"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"float | None"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"None"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["Half-life in hours for the exponential recency decay. Default from ","$L9e"," (24h)"]}]]}],"$L9f","$La0","$La1"]}]]}]
14:["$","p",null,{"children":["Each result dict includes keys like ",["$","code",null,{"children":"id"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"content"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"source"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"importance"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"timestamp"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"score"}],", and ",["$","code",null,{"children":"tier"}]," (indicating working vs. episodic)."]}]

56:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"sync_to"}]

5e:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"V2 Properties"}]
5f:["$","p",null,{"children":["The ",["$","code",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne"}]," instance exposes several v2 subsystems as lazy-initialized properties:"]}]
60:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Property"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Type"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Description"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"stream"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MemoryStream"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["Thread-safe event stream with push (",["$","code",null,{"children":"on"}],"/",["$","code",null,{"children":"on_any"}]," callbacks) and pull (",["$","code",null,{"children":"listen"}]," iterator) patterns for real-time memory notifications"]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"compressor"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MemoryCompressor"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Dictionary-based, RLE, and semantic compression strategies for reducing memory footprint"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"patterns"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"PatternDetector"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Detects temporal (hour/weekday), content (keyword frequency, co-occurrence), and sequence patterns across memories"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"delta_sync"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"DeltaSync"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Incremental synchronization between Mnemosyne instances with checkpointed resume support"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"plugins"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"PluginManager"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["Discovers and manages plugins from ",["$","code",null,{"children":"~/.hermes/mnemosyne/plugins/"}],". Built-in: ",["$","code",null,{"children":"LoggingPlugin"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MetricsPlugin"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"FilterPlugin"}]]}]]}]]}]]}]
61:["$","$L9d",null,{"code":"from mnemosyne import Mnemosyne\n\nmem = Mnemosyne()\n\n# Access the stream for real-time notifications\nmem.stream.on(EventType.MEMORY_ADDED, lambda event: print(f\"New memory: {event}\"))\n\n# Listen to stream as an iterator\nfor event in mem.stream.listen():\n  print(f\"Event: {event.event_type.name} - {event.memory_id}\")\n\n# Detect patterns across stored memories\npatterns = mem.detect_patterns()\n\n# Or get a summary\nsummary = mem.summarize_patterns()\n\n# Incremental sync to a peer\ndelta = mem.sync_to(peer_id=\"remote-1\")\n\n# Apply a sync from a peer\nresult = mem.sync_from(peer_id=\"remote-1\", delta=received_delta)\n","language":"python"}]
62:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"MemoryStream API"}]
63:["$","p",null,{"children":["The ",["$","code",null,{"children":"stream"}]," property exposes a ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MemoryStream"}]," with these methods:"]}]
64:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Method"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Signature"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Description"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"on"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"on(event_type: type"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"on_any"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"on_any(callback: Callable)"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Register a callback for all event types"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"off"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"off(event_type: EventType, callback: Callable)"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Remove a specific callback"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"off_any"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"off_any(callback: callback"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"emit"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"emit(event: occur"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"get_buffer"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"get_buffer(event_types=None, filtered"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"clear_buffer"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"clear_buffer()"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Clear the event buffer"}]]}]]}]]}]
65:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"DeltaSync API"}]
66:["$","p",null,{"children":["The ",["$","code",null,{"children":"delta_sync"}]," property exposes a ",["$","code",null,{"children":"DeltaSync"}]," with these methods:"]}]
67:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Method"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Signature"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Description"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"get_checkpoint"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"get_checkpoint(peer_id) -> Optional[SyncCheckpoint]"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Get the last sync checkpoint for a peer"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"set_checkpoint"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"set_checkpoint(peer_id, checkpoint)"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Set the sync checkpoint for a peer"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"compute_delta"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"compute_delta(peer_id, table='working_memory') -> list[dict]"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Compute changes since last sync"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"apply_delta"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"apply_delta(peer_id, delta, table='working_memory') -> dict"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Apply a received delta"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"sync_to"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"sync_to(peer_id, table='working_memory') -> dict"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Compute and checkpoint a delta (convenience)"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"sync_from"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"sync_from(peer_id, delta, table='working_memory') -> dict"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Apply and checkpoint a delta (convenience)"}]]}]]}]]}]
68:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"PatternDetector API"}]
69:["$","p",null,{"children":["The ",["$","code",null,{"children":"patterns"}]," property exposes a ",["$","code",null,{"children":"PatternDetector"}]," with these methods:"]}]
6a:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Method"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Signature"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Description"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"detect_temporal"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"detect_temporal(memories) -> list[DetectedPattern]"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Detect hour-of-day and day-of-week patterns"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"detect_content"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"detect_content(memories) -> list[DetectedPattern]"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Detect frequent keywords and co-occurrence"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"detect_sequence"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"detect_sequence(memories) -> list[DetectedPattern]"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Detect source-based sequence patterns"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"detect_all"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"detect_all(memories) -> list[DetectedPattern]"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Run all detectors, sorted by confidence"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"summarize_patterns"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"summarize_patterns(memories) -> dict"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Human-readable summary of all patterns"}]]}]]}]]}]
6b:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Scratchpad"}]
